notes: Each upgrade is self-contained: the 'effects' list fully describes its behavior. No Python edits needed to add a new upgrade  -  add the entry here and it works automatically. See data/schema/upgrades.schema.json for the full effect vocabulary.

upgrades.name: Laugh Track
upgrades.desc: All SITCOMs gain +50 Base Views. Even when nothing is funny. ESPECIALLY when nothing is funny. Ha.

upgrades.name: Sweeps Week
upgrades.desc: PRIME TIME shows gain x1.3 Views. Networks have been gaming your emotions this way since 1954.

upgrades.name: Syndication Deal
upgrades.desc: Vault shows earn x0.5 Views (up from x0.25) & +$5 Income/season. The show ended 15 years ago. The residuals are eternal.

upgrades.name: Merchandising Empire
upgrades.desc: All SCIFI shows generate +$8 Income/season. The T-shirt costs $3 to make and sells for $45. This is the way.

upgrades.name: Award Season
upgrades.desc: All DRAMAs gain x1.25 Views. A golden trophy validates an entire season of suffering. Critics weep. Ratings soar.

upgrades.name: The Spinoff
upgrades.desc: Shows in Season 3+ gain +80 Base Views. Good IP never truly dies. It just gets a prequel, a sequel, and a podcast.

upgrades.name: The Algorithm
upgrades.desc: All shows gain +(Current Season x 5) bonus Views each season. The machine knows what you want before you do.

upgrades.name: Product Placement
upgrades.desc: Every attached Ad generates +$2 Extra Income per season. Tony Stark drinks Audi. Bond uses Sony. The check never bounces.

upgrades.name: Celebrity Feud
upgrades.desc: PRIME TIME shows with 1+ Star gain +40 Views. Beef sells advertising. Always has. Taylor knows this.

upgrades.name: Streaming Threat
upgrades.desc: All REALITY and SPORTS shows gain x1.2 Views. Panic-buy eyeballs before the streamers do. Act now.

upgrades.name: Awards Circuit
upgrades.desc: All DRAMAs gain x1.25 Views. Stacks with Award Season for x1.5625 total. An extra trophy shelf has been ordered.

upgrades.name: Sports Bar Network
upgrades.desc: All SPORTS shows gain +$10 Income/season. The bar sponsors everything with a TV.

upgrades.name: Daytime Dominance
upgrades.desc: Morning and Afternoon shows gain +25 Views. Coffee-fueled audiences are loyal.

upgrades.name: Press Tour
upgrades.desc: Shows with at least 1 Star gain +40 Views. The late-night circuit delivers.

upgrades.name: Night Owl Writers Room
upgrades.desc: Late Night shows gain +$6 Income/season. The staff never sleeps anyway.

upgrades.name: Color Broadcast Rollout
upgrades.desc: All shows gain +20 Base Views. The 1965 color switch made everything pop.

upgrades.name: HDTV Transition (2009)
upgrades.desc: PRIME TIME shows gain x1.15 Views. It is so crisp you can see the stage lights.

upgrades.name: Closed Captioning Act (1990)
upgrades.desc: All shows gain +10 Views. Shows with 1+ Ad gain +$3 Income. Accessibility wins ratings.

upgrades.name: DVR Revolution (TiVo 1999)
upgrades.desc: Vault reruns gain +0.1 view multiplier & +$3 Income/season. Appointment viewing is optional now.

upgrades.name: 24-Hour News Cycle
upgrades.desc: All NEWS shows gain +35 Base Views & +$5 Income/season. Something is always happening. We cover all of it.

upgrades.name: Cooking Block
upgrades.desc: All COOKING shows gain x1.2 Views. Schedule three back to back and the audience refuses to leave the couch.

upgrades.name: Test Kitchen Sponsorship
upgrades.desc: All COOKING shows gain +$8 Income/season. A major appliance brand funds the kitchen. The blender is always on screen.

upgrades.name: Tabloid Coverage
upgrades.desc: Shows with 1+ Star gain +55 Views. A star-studded lineup generates gossip column inches. Every inch is an eyeball.

upgrades.name: Triple Platinum Contract
upgrades.desc: Live shows with 1+ Star AND 1+ Ad gain x1.15 Views. Star power and sponsorship in the same slot  -  executives call it synergy.

upgrades.name: Golden Age Revival
upgrades.desc: Shows in Season 3+ gain x1.2 Views. A vintage aesthetic is trending. Your older shows are now 'prestige classics.'

upgrades.name: Late Night Ratings War
upgrades.desc: Late Night shows gain +55 Views. The midnight slot is contested. Monologues are sharper. The band plays louder.
